title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Inanna and Mt. Ebih
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Inanna and Mt. Ebih.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Inanna and Mt. Ebih.

translation.text: From 'Inanna and Mt. Ebih': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
